v0.6.0.name: UFO-first build + 186 donors + 99.79% coverage
v0.6.0.notes: Major rebuild: UFO-first architecture with committed per-plane UFO sources (BMP 48k glyphs, SMP 28k, SIP 61k, TIP 13k, SSP 338). 8 new code-chart donors via ucode 0.5.0–0.5.2 CID-font extraction cover the last remaining blocks (Syriac Supplement, Mongolian Supplement, Myanmar Extended-C, Garay, Kana Extended-A/B, Ol Onal, Small Kana Extension). fontisan 0.4.43 viewBox fix for correct glyph coordinates. Only Tags and Variation Selectors Supplement remain uncovered — both are invisible formatting characters with no visual glyph.

v0.5.2.name: Clamp extreme coordinates from synthetic SVG-generated fonts
v0.5.2.notes: Fixes distorted glyph proportions in the SMP face. 960 of 1020 phantom glyphs from synthetic SVG-generated donor fonts (Gurung Khema, Nyiakeng Puachue Hmong, Tulu Tigalari, etc.) had coordinates 2–11x the declared UPM, inflating the SMP face head.bbox to yMax=11160 and causing all glyphs — including hieroglyphs — to render with distorted proportions. CoordinateClamp now runs after UFO normalization. Same codepoint coverage as v0.5.0 (123,611 codepoints).

v0.5.1.name: fontisan 0.4.41 — CFF + compound glyph fixes
v0.5.1.notes: Same codepoint coverage as v0.5.0 (123,611 codepoints). Published to npm as essenfont@0.5.1.

v0.5.0.name: CFF outline fix + compound glyph fix + fontisan 0.4.41
v0.5.0.notes: CFF outline filler (CffOutlineFiller) bridges fontisan's stubbed CFF glyph extraction — all CFF-based OTF donors (Noto Serif Tangut, etc.) now produce real outlines. Compound (composite) glyph fix from fontisan 0.4.41. cp_map identical to v0.3.7 (123,611 codepoints).

v0.4.1.name: Compound (composite) glyph fix
v0.4.1.notes: Fixes compound (composite) glyphs that had empty or offset contours. Combined with the CFF outline fix from v0.4.0.

v0.4.0.name: CFF-based OTF donors (Tangut, etc.) outline fix
v0.4.0.notes: First release with CffOutlineFiller — fontisan's UFO converter stubs out CFF glyph extraction, producing empty contours for CFF-based OTF donors. This release bridges OutlineExtractor into the UFO to fill real outlines.

v0.3.7.name: Verified — OTC (CFF2) + cache infrastructure (SVG, WOFF2)
v0.3.7.notes: Identical coverage to v0.3.4 (cp_map byte-stable: 123,611 codepoints). Canonical OTC with CFF2 outlines. BuildCache infrastructure wired through the whole release pipeline.

v0.3.6.name: Broken — SVG refactor NameError (superseded by v0.3.7)
v0.3.6.notes: Broken release — NameError in SVG export. Superseded by v0.3.7.

v0.3.5.name: Disk-based UFO cache + SVG + WOFF2 caching
v0.3.5.notes: Disk UFO cache + SVG export + per-plane WOFF2 encoding cache.

v0.3.4.name: Build cache rescue + stable cp_map
v0.3.4.notes: Fix rescue for Marshal errors in BuildCache. cp_map stable at 123,611 codepoints.

v0.3.3.name: UFO conversion build cache
v0.3.3.notes: Build cache for UFO conversions — cuts build time ~40%.

v0.3.2.name: restrict_to_covers for Egyptian donors
v0.3.2.notes: Add restrict_to_covers to egyptian-text + new-gardiner donors.

v0.3.1.name: OTC (CFF2) as canonical output
v0.3.1.notes: Produce OTC (CFF2) as canonical output, not TTC (glyf).
